description_long: This object is a vintage-style gas pump with a predominantly red, weathered exterior and a tall, rectangular body. The front features a circular sign at the top labeled 'GASOLINE DIESEL FUSION' with a stylized 'RR' logo, a glass display window for fuel readings, and a lower panel with a retro illustration and additional branding. A black fuel hose with a nozzle is attached to the side, looping down and resting against the body. The back and sides are plain, showing the aged red metal surface, with the hose and nozzle visible from the rear. The base is black and slightly wider, providing stability, and the overall design evokes a mid-20th-century aesthetic.
description: A vintage red gas pump with a circular branded sign, glass display, black hose, and retro illustration on the front. The body is weathered metal with a sturdy black base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular 'GASOLINE DIESEL FUSION' sign, glass display, retro illustration, and the main hose and nozzle.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain red metal surface, the top of the circular sign, and the hose and nozzle hanging down the back.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the pump, the protruding hose, and the edge of the display and sign.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain red surface with the circular sign visible from the side and no hose or display features.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage-style fuel pump, red in color, with a single black hose and nozzle attached to the side. The pump features a glass display and a retro illustration, with branding on the circular sign at the top.
attribute_station_signage: A prominent circular sign at the top reads 'GASOLINE DIESEL FUSION' with a stylized 'RR' logo in black and white. There is also a retro illustrated panel on the lower front with additional branding and text.
